messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0014",
  "title": "一线洞察",
  "page_index": 15,
  "page_range": "15"
}

Section text:
一线洞察
益世界、 NEOCRAFT 、英雄游戏、游艺春秋

message.content: This section can answer questions about which entities are associated with the "一线洞察" (Frontline Insights) topic. It explicitly lists four entities: 益世界, NEOCRAFT, 英雄游戏, and 游艺春秋. The section does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. Its retrieval value is strictly limited to entity identification and topic association.
